---
name: review
description: 'Autonomous PR review that posts high-signal, human-voiced comments under your account; --loop closes the feedback loop without babysitting. Use when reviewing someone else''s PR (or your own manifest-driven PR) and you want a precision-tuned review you can walk away from. Triggers: review pr, autonomous review, post pr review, autoreview, loop review, watch pr review.'
argument-hint: '[pr-url] [--manifest <path>] [--bundle <urls>] [--loop]'
user-invocable: true
---

**Inputs and fleet.** Take `pr-url` from the arg or infer from the current branch's upstream PR; no PR → abort with a reason. Auto-discover the manifest from `.manifest/` only when the PR's head branch is yours; `--manifest <path>` overrides. Parse linked PRs from the PR description and conversation (`Depends on #N`, `Stack:`, `Co-changes:`, PR URLs); `--bundle <urls>` merges in; cap 5. Spawn reviewers in parallel — always-on `change-intent-reviewer`, `code-bugs-reviewer`, `code-design-reviewer`, `code-maintainability-reviewer`, `code-simplicity-reviewer`, `context-file-adherence-reviewer`; content-gated when the diff fits: `type-safety-reviewer` on typed code; `test-quality-reviewer` and `code-testability-reviewer` on source; `contracts-reviewer` on API surfaces; `operational-readiness-reviewer` on CI/infra/env/migrations/workers/queues/secrets; `docs-reviewer` and `prose-value-reviewer` on prose; `prompt-reviewer` (with `prompt-token-efficiency-verifier`, `prompt-compression-verifier`) on prompts/skills/agents. Forward the manifest. **Reviewers stay narrow-lens — never pass them PR conversation or bundle context.** Filter findings to Medium+.

**Coherence and post.** Spawn the holistic-pass subagent — load `references/HOLISTIC_PASS.md` — passing it the findings, PR history, bundle, and manifest; it prunes, dedupes, anchors (inline/file/PR-level), and rewrites in human voice (load `references/VOICE.md`). Plan via ExitPlanMode (comments + anchors, context loaded, any truncation). On approval, submit a single GitHub PR review with decision `comment` (never `request_changes`, never `approve` here). **Zero Medium+ findings after the coherence pass:** ask via AskUserQuestion — `"Looks good to me — post as approval on the PR?"`. Approve → submit decision `approve` with body `Looks good to me.`; decline → exit silent. **No AI disclosure footer, ever; no flag for one.**

**`--loop`.** Bypass approval entirely; initial post and reruns run autonomously. After posting, `subscribe_pr_activity` and wait per round: 15 → 30 → 60 → 120 min, events resolving the wait early. On each wake, per pending comment spawn a per-comment verifier (load `references/VERIFIER.md`) returning `addressed-by-fix`, `addressed-by-valid-reply`, or `needs-our-pushback`. Pushback → post the verifier's drafted reply as a thread reply on the existing comment (not a new review); **one round of pushback per thread maximum, then drop**. All resolved → rerun the full pipeline (the holistic pass dedupes against our prior comments via PR history); fresh backoff. **Termini, first to fire:** clean rerun + zero new findings + user-approved lgtm → submit `approve` review, exit; lgtm declined → exit silent; 3 cycles total; 24h wall-clock backstop; or the 4-tier wait cap elapses with comments still pending — silent unsubscribe + chat summary in all but the first two. Never post a bump comment.
